title: Verify existing implementation of token expiry checker
description: The `isTokenExpired(token: string): boolean` function already exists in `src/auth/token-utils.ts`. It decodes JWT using base64url and checks the `exp` claim against current timestamp. Tests in `src/auth/token-utils.test.ts` cover: valid non-expired token, expired token, malformed tokens, and missing exp claim. All 4 tests pass.
existing_patterns: vitest testing with beforeEach setup pattern
